label: WebOS System Services
info:
Local Edge Node services for the browser-based WebOS.
Exposes headless browser capabilities (screenshots, scraping, PDF generation)
via localhost HTTP endpoints that the WebOS can call.

name: WebOS Local Edge Node - Headless Browser Services
info:
These endpoints provide RPC-style access to a warm Chromium instance.
The WebOS (running in the user's browser) makes fetch() calls to these
localhost endpoints to perform tasks that require a full browser engine.

Endpoints:
- POST /os/screenshot - Capture a screenshot of a URL or HTML
- POST /os/scrape - Extract text content from a JavaScript-rendered page
- POST /os/pdf - Generate a PDF from HTML content
- GET /os/proxy?url=... - Reverse proxy that strips X-Frame-Options/CSP for iframe embedding
- POST /os/browser/action - Stateful remote browser control (goto, click, type, screenshot)

name: Take Screenshot
Scrape Page Text
Generate PDF
Iframe Reverse Proxy
Remote Browser Control — Stateful Puppeteer API
info:
Persistent browser session with saved cookies via userDataDir.
POST /os/browser/action with { action, url?, selector?, text? }
Actions: goto, click, type, screenshot
Always returns a base64 screenshot + DOM text.

name: Remote Browser Control
